Title: The Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act (PECA)
Content: The PECA law in Pakistan primarily deals with cybercrime
column5: and electronic communications. It provides a legal framework for the investigation
column7: and trial of offences related to electronic media and data. Key provisions include offenses against the dignity of a person

Title: The Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan - Article 14
Content: Article 14 of the Constitution states: 'The dignity of man and
column6: shall be inviolable.' This fundamental right is often cited in cases involving data privacy and surveillance.
